license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.d7i9kd
title: An. gambiae complex species identification by PCR
author: Fabio Gomes

steps_raw.instruction: Run PCR setup Hot Start: 94° for 2 min 30 cycles of: 94° for 30 sec 50° for 30 sec 72° for 30 sec Final extension: 72° for 5 min 4° forever
Take 10-15 uL PCR product, complete to 17.5 uL with NFW. Add 2 uL 10x HhaI Buffer and 0.5 uL HhaI Incubate at 37oC Overnihgt
Run Agarose Gel using 100 bp ladder
